description: ipanema sandals draw inspiration from the culture of the Brazilian city of ipanema. The tropical city's street style is reinterpreted in ipanema footwear - bold prints, vibrant colours and quirky embellishments. A brand with a cause, iPanema collaborated with Gisele Bündchen for a climate change project and these products represent their commitment to social-change. Upper White footbed and pretty pink straps T-straps with flower embellishments in rubber Soft footbed Branded lug on the footbed Floral print on the footbed Thick footbed Outsole Single piece PVC moulded, flexible outsole Waffle patterned grooves Upraised heel Sandal care Wipe with a clean, dry cloth to remove dust
